title: Kriloud copy
body:
# This mod will allow you to copy messages from Minecraft chat with one click.

If you need to save a information, for example, the coordinates of the portal sent to chat, then with the help of this mod you will be able to do this. You just need to click by the message you want to copy! The message will be immediately saved to the clipboard.
* Works only with vanila chat (chat with chatty plugin dont work!)
